steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration & Compilation
steps.description: Convert Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure successful compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.claude/agents/setup-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation artifacts are generated successfully.

steps.name: Compilation Check Decision
steps.description: Check if COMPILATION_FAILED.md exists to determine if workflow should stop

steps.name: Phase 1: Contract Analysis & Scaffolding Preparation
steps.description: Identify contracts for invariant testing and prepare scaffolding requirements
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.claude/agents/setup-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 2: Setup.sol Configuration
steps.description: Modify Setup.sol to deploy and configure all target contracts for fuzzing
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.claude/agents/setup-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-2 agent using the Task tool. This phase will modify the Setup.sol contract to properly deploy and configure target contracts, validate compilation and test execution, and generate documentation in magic/setup-notes.md.

steps.name: Workflow Completion Summary
steps.description: Generate final summary of fuzzing setup completion
steps.prompt:
Create a file called FUZZING_SETUP_COMPLETE.md that summarizes:
1. Successfully completed all three phases (Phase 0: Foundry Migration, Phase 1: Contract Analysis, Phase 2: Setup.sol Configuration)
2. List the key artifacts created (foundry.toml, Setup.sol, magic/setup-notes.md)
3. Confirm that forge build compiles successfully
4. Confirm that forge test runs without reverts
5. Provide next steps: user can now run fuzzing campaigns using Echidna or other fuzzing tools
